subject: [PATCH] cxl/acpi: fix CXL_ACPI=y + CXL_PMEM=m link failure

2026-03-06.patch_summary: This patch fixes a link failure between the cxl_acpi and cxl_pmem modules when CXL_ACPI is built-in and CXL_PMEM is a module. The issue arises from a symbol dependency created by moving devm_cxl_add_nvdimm_bridge() to cxl_pmem.ko. The fix uses IS_REACHABLE() instead of IS_ENABLED() to prevent the link error.
